calendar.matters:
NOTICE OF HEARING AND TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER (ELDER OR DEPENDENT ADULT ABUSE)
Off Calendar Dec-31-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Elder or Dependent Adult Abuse TRO hearing this day.

This matter was called with case number CCH 08-568802, Roy Miller vs. John Anthony Brown.

Dept. 204, Judge Pro Temp: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: Jackie Alameda, CSR: Karen Farnsworth, Bailiff: Deputy R. Guitron.

Plaintiff: John Anthony Brown, present in pro per.

Defendant: Roy Lee Miller, present in pro per.

Parties were sworn and examined.

The Court hears testimony, receives evidence and after hearing the evidence presented, the Plaintiff's order is Granted as follows: Defendant shall stay at least 50 yards away from the protected person: John Anthony Brown and his Residence.

Defendant shall not Harass, Attack, Strike, Threaten, Assault (sexually or otherwise), Hit, Follow, Stalk, Destroy Personal Property, Keep under Surveillance, or Block Movements, Contact (directly or indirectly), Telephone, Send Messages, Mail or e-Mail, Take Any Action, Directly or Through Others, to Obtain the Addresses or Locations of the Protected Persons.

Expires three years from the date of issuance.

Order signed in open court.
